title: Sterigmostemum tomentosum

intro: Sterigmostemum tomentosum, also known as Sterigmostemon or Sterigmostemon tomentosum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Sterigmostemum tomentosum include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
